summary: Full frontend testing of 3-part UI overhaul for Deployment Doctor. All major features working. One minor routing note: Demo Center is at /sample-scenarios (not /samples). All pages load and integrate correctly with backend.

ui_bugs.issue: Console warning: chart width/height = -1. Chart renders but may have sizing issue in some container configurations.

action_items: Fix Recharts chart container sizing (width/height -1 console warning in Knowledge Base page) - add minWidth/minHeight or fixed dimensions to chart container
critical_code_review_comments: Recharts BarChart in IncidentKnowledgeBasePage.js logs width/height=-1 warnings. Wrap ResponsiveContainer in a div with explicit height (e.g., h-48 or h-64) to ensure proper sizing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new pages working: HomePage (/) with hero, metrics, dropzone, How It Works, Value Props; IncidentKnowledgeBasePage (/incidents) with Recharts chart, category pills, blueprint list with relationship arrows; RelationshipsPage (/relationships) with ReactFlow DAG (38 nodes, 53 edges), search, role filters, scenario overlay (highlights detected nodes). Demo Center at /sample-scenarios works end-to-end including report generation. Report page at /report/:id shows full analysis.
passed_tests: Homepage hero text 'Deterministic Root Cause Analysis' visible
All 5 metric cards: 38 Blueprints, 445 Rules, 53 Edges, 50 Scenarios, 70 Tests
Upload dropzone visible
Run Incident Analysis button disabled when no file
How It Works: 3 steps (Upload Log File, Rule Engine Runs, Cascade Traced)
4 Value Props: Explainability, Auditable, Reproducible, No Hallucinations
Sidebar: Analyze, Demo Center, Knowledge Base, Cascade Explorer
Knowledge Base /incidents loads 'Operational Knowledge Library'
Recharts bar chart renders (with minor sizing warning)
Category filter pills visible: ALL, KUBERNETES, NETWORKING, DATABASE, CLOUD, CACHE, MESSAGING, SECURITY, CONFIGURATION, APPLICATION, RESOURCES, STORAGE
KUBERNETES pill click filters blueprints
Blueprint rows show relationship arrows (→ ←), severity badges, category tags
Cascade Explorer /relationships loads with stats: Root Causes 21, Intermediates 11, Symptoms 6, Edges 53
ReactFlow graph renders 38 nodes with color coding
Search input filters/dims nodes
Role filter buttons (All Nodes, Root Cause, Intermediate, Symptom) visible
Scenario dropdown populated with 50 scenarios
Selecting scenario + Highlight Cascade calls backend, shows 'Cascade overlay active: N detected'
Demo Center /sample-scenarios loads scenario cards
Run Demo button works and navigates to /report/:id
Report page shows full analysis with confidence, evidence, contributing incidents
